articles.title: 2 more passengers evacuated from cruise ship test positive for hantavirus
articles.description:
Three cruise ship passengers have died, and there are at least six confirmed hantavirus cases, according to the World Health Organization.

The post 2 more passengers evacuated from cruise ship test positive for hantavirus appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Three cruise ship passengers have died from hantavirus, raising health concerns for travelers.
At least six confirmed hantavirus cases reported, prompting increased vigilance among local health officials.
Boston residents may face heightened health risks as more cases emerge from the cruise ship outbreak.

articles.title: Here are the Celtics’ pick numbers in the 2026 NBA Draft

summary: Celtics hold the 27th pick in the 2026 NBA Draft.

Draft outcomes could influence team performance and local sports engagement in 2026.

articles.title: Latest Red Line shutdown kicks in this week
articles.description:
Free shuttle buses and accessible van service will operate between Broadway and Ashmont.

The post Latest Red Line shutdown kicks in this week appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Line shutdown starts this week, affecting daily commuters in Boston.
Free shuttle buses and accessible van service provided between Broadway and Ashmont.
Residents should plan for potential delays and alternative transportation options.

articles.title: Accused serial rapist Alvin Campbell Jr. — the AG’s brother — stands trial this week. Here’s what to know.
articles.description:
Campbell faces a slew of rape, sexual assault, and kidnapping charges in a series of incidents prosecutors have described as “chillingly similar.”

The post Accused serial rapist Alvin Campbell Jr. — the AG’s brother — stands trial this week. Here’s what to know. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Alvin Campbell Jr. stands trial this week for multiple rape and kidnapping charges.
Prosecutors cite at least three chillingly similar incidents linked to Campbell.
The trial raises concerns about public safety and trust in local law enforcement.

articles.title: Washington wins NBA draft lottery, chance to pick first on June 23
articles.description:
Utah will pick No. 2, Memphis will pick No. 3 and Chicago will pick No. 4.

The post Washington wins NBA draft lottery, chance to pick first on June 23 appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Washington wins NBA draft lottery, securing first pick on June 23.
Utah, Memphis, and Chicago will follow with picks No. 2, No. 3, and No. 4.
Boston fans may see increased competition as top talent enters the league.

articles.title: The surprisingly small world behind Cambridge and Somerville’s cafe scene
articles.description:
Shared staff, spin-off bakeries, and longtime friendships have created one of Greater Boston’s most interconnected coffee scenes.

The post The surprisingly small world behind Cambridge and Somerville’s cafe scene appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Cambridge and Somerville cafes share staff, creating a tightly-knit community.
Several spin-off bakeries have emerged from local cafes, enhancing the food scene.
This interconnectedness fosters collaboration and innovation among local businesses.
